title: Diamond Powder Mod
description: Melt diamond tools or armour to get diamond powder cashback!
body:
# Main Feature
This mod adds an ability to get a small part of diamond from unnecessary tools or armour by melting it into diamond powder. Is sooner can be crafted into a full diamond by 4 piles of it!
## Future changes
Adding an ability to get all resources from items that you don't need, such as netherite.
